description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs an apt-get update installing cmake, qtbase5-dev, qtdeclarative5-dev, libqt5sql5-sqlite, libqt5svg5-dev, libqt5multimedia5-plugins, qtmultimedia5-dev in a before_script, then defines a single job named elisa in the default stage. The elisa job creates a root directory, clones the extra-cmake-modules repository, checks out tag v5.24.0, builds it with cmake using -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../../root and -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=../../root, runs make install, then clones the elisa repository, configures it with cmake using the same prefixes, and builds it with make. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are specified.
